name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: San Diego, CA's Western Union Money Order Only at 3744 Ocean View Blvd serves the Ocean View neighborhood with money order services.
description_long:
Western Union Money Order Only is located at 3744 Ocean View Blvd, a standalone facility in San Diego's Ocean View neighborhood. Hours are extended throughout the week: Monday 8AM–11PM, Tuesday through Thursday 6AM–10PM, Friday and Saturday 6AM–11:30PM, and Sunday 6AM–10PM. This San Diego, CA location makes it convenient for residents of the Ocean View area who need money order services.

This Western Union Money Order Only location serves the San Diego community with money order sending and related transaction services. Call +1 619-263-1400 to ask about specific services or to confirm hours before visiting 3744 Ocean View Blvd. The staff can assist with your money order needs.

To use the money order services at this San Diego location, bring a valid photo ID and the amount you need to send. Money orders are a reliable choice for San Diego residents paying bills, rent, or making personal transfers without using cash or checks.
address: 3744 Ocean View Blvd, San Diego, CA 92113

company_info.headquarters: 3744 Ocean View Blvd, San Diego, CA 92113

pros: Extensive network of 850+ US locations including major retailers (Walmart, grocery chains) and bank partners for convenient access
Multiple service options beyond transfers: bill payment, money orders, prepaid cards, and cash pickup all available in-person
Hybrid convenience—customers can register transfers online or via app and complete payment in cash at agent locations
Established 173-year track record (since 1851) with stated encryption and fraud prevention protections
Money orders accepted as check alternative and can be deposited directly into bank accounts
First online international money transfer is fee-free (promotional offer noted on website)
Flexible payment options at select locations (cash, debit, and credit card accepted)
cons: Pricing varies significantly by transfer method and destination with no transparent posted fee schedule on website
Does not provide currency exchange services at physical locations despite offering international transfers
Currently experiencing documented delays for payments to Orange Wallet in Cameroon (service reliability issue)
In-person service hours vary by location with no standardized operating times
Requires valid ID and additional documentation for some transfers, creating friction in transaction process
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers without bank accounts who prefer in-person transactions
Individuals sending domestic money transfers who value physical location convenience
Customers needing to pay bills (utilities, rent, car payments) at a local physical location
People seeking money orders as a secure check alternative for payment transmission
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked consumers and those preferring in-person transactions who need domestic/international money transfers, bill payments, or money order services. The main caveat is that pricing is non-transparent and varies significantly by transfer type and destination, requiring customers to use their cost calculator before committing to a transaction, and some international corridors experience documented service delays.
services: In-person domestic money transfers at agent locations
International money transfers with recipient currency conversion
Money order purchase and cashing at participating locations
Bill payment services (utilities, rent, car payments) at agent locations
Cash pickup from money sent by others using MTCN tracking
Western Union Prepaid Visa Card funding and receipt
Online or app-initiated transfers completed with in-person cash payment
Money Transfer Control Number (MTCN) generation and tracking for recipients
Services available at retail partners (Walmart, grocery chains, dedicated locations)
Bank partner network for in-person money transfers and cash pickups
meta_description: Western Union Money Order Only at 3744 Ocean View Blvd, San Diego, CA. Money order services with extended hours.
